title: 24pc Stainless Steel Cutlery Set in Blister Card, Silver
features: Timeless Design: Features a polished finish and ergonomic handles for a stylish yet comfortable grip.
Durable & Sturdy: Made with high-grade stainless steel that resists bending and corrosion.
Versatile Use: Perfect for family meals, dinner parties, or gifting for weddings and housewarmings.
Easy to Clean: Dishwasher safe for effortless cleanup while maintaining its glossy appearance.
What's Included: 6 Dinner Forks 6 Dinner Knives 6 Tablespoons 6 Teaspoons
description: Upgrade your dining experience with this 24-piece stainless steel cutlery set, designed to combine modern elegance with long-lasting durability. Crafted from premium-quality stainless steel, this set is resistant to rust, stains, and scratches, ensuring it retains its sleek shine through everyday use and special occasions.
